steps.title: Use the requested count
steps.content: The goal is to specify the number of merchant ships in Saudi Arabia in 2021. The relevant note gives that number directly: 392 merchant ships were registered there in 2021.

steps.title: Reject noncount details
steps.content: A and B give the combined deadweight tonnage, not the ship count. C defines deadweight tonnage and gives no number of ships. The correct response must state the 392-ship count. The answer is D.
